description: CompositionPink round neck top made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and gathered sides, and graphic on the chestFittingRegular 98 cm (29-30 months) Wash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptlyLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryIndulge your little one in happy feelings with this pink tee from gini and jony.
